faq.question: Why is a landing page better than a full website for a specialist?
faq.answer: A landing page is a single-page website focused on one key action: booking a service. For specialists, this is the ideal format.

faq.question: Can I show a portfolio of work on the landing page?
faq.answer: Yes, the gallery allows adding specialist work photos — examples of nail art, haircuts, or skincare treatments.

faq.question: How does online booking work on the landing page?
faq.answer: The booking form allows the client to select service and convenient time — request comes to you by email.

faq.question: Will the landing page appear in search engines?
faq.answer: Yes, landing pages are SEO-optimized and indexed by Google and Yandex.

faq.question: Can I change the design after creation?
faq.answer: Yes, in the editor you can change texts, photos, colors, and block order.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a specialist landing page?
faq.answer: You can create a landing page for free. Paid plans give access to domain and additional features.
